result.summary: Clever exposes HTTP integration surfaces for its Data API and OIDC `/userinfo` endpoint, authenticated with district-app bearer tokens or user SSO OAuth bearer tokens depending on the flow.
result.description: Clever provides school software integrations for rostering, identity, and single sign-on between applications and K–12 districts. It connects partner applications to district data, user identity, and LMS-related workflows.

clever_oauth_app.label: Clever OAuth/OIDC application credentials (client ID and client secret)
clever_oauth_app.setup: Create a development app in the [Clever App Dashboard](https://apps.clever.com) as described in [Getting Started with Clever](https://dev.clever.com/docs/getting-started.md). Use the app's `client_id` and `client_secret` from the dashboard. For OIDC, ask [Clever Support](https://support.clever.com) to configure your app for OIDC as described in [OIDC Implementation](https://dev.clever.com/docs/oidc-implementation.md).

clever_district_app_token.label: Clever district-app bearer token
clever_district_app_token.setup: Have a district authorize your Clever application; Clever creates a district-app token each time a district authorizes the app. Obtain it through the district onboarding flow referenced in [Onboarding and Syncing with Clever](https://dev.clever.com/docs/onboarding#section-obtaining-district-app-tokens) from the [Clever API Overview](https://dev.clever.com/docs/api-overview.md). This token is used for district-managed API access.

clever_sso_access_token.label: Clever SSO bearer access token
clever_sso_access_token.setup: Create a Clever app in the [Clever App Dashboard](https://apps.clever.com), then send users through Clever's OAuth authorization-code flow as documented in [OAuth Implementation](https://dev.clever.com/docs/oauth-implementation.md). Exchange the authorization code at `https://clever.com/oauth/tokens` using your app credentials to receive a bearer `access_token`. For Clever Library testing, the same flow is shown in [Testing Clever Library with Postman](https://dev.clever.com/docs/testing-clever-library-with-postman.md).
